attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE                  
  ,CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE
  , NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT
   WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE                  
   ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
   AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
     WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
     AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
      )
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT
   WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE                  
   ,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'
   AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
     WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
     AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'C' 
      )
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT
  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
  ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , WNGL.LINE_ID
  ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_GET_LINES_CG WNGL
  ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  WHERE
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
  AND
  (EXISTS 
  
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
   WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
   AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
   AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
  ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , WNGL.LINE_ID
  ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_GET_LINES_CG WNGL
  ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  WHERE
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
  AND COALESCE(WNGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
   WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
   AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
   AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)

SELECT
   WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
   AND EXISTS
   ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
      WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
      AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
      AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
     )
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  = Y.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY )

SELECT 
    WNICE.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY 
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  
    ,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
    ,WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
    ,WNICE.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
    ,WNICE.GL_DT
    ,WNICE.SS_CODE
    ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
    ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
    ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
    ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
    ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
    ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
    ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
    ,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    ,NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
    ,WNICE.MERAKI_TRX_QTY                    
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
    ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
    AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_VAL_CG  WNIVI
    ON WNICE.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNIVI.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	AND WNICE.SS_CODE=NGLA.SS_CODE
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
    ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
    AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
    /*WHERE WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Daily Rates','Immediate')*/ /*RECHECK WHETHER RQD OR NOT*/

SELECT DISTINCT
  NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
  WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ,
  NMRT.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  WI.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NMRT.GL_DT,
  NMRT.GL_POSTED_DT,
  WI.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
  NMRT.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
  WI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NMRT.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
  NMRT.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
  NMRT.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT,
  NMRT.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT,
  NMRT.CLAIM_END_DT AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  NMRT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  NMRT.CLAIM_START_DT AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
  NMRT.SS_CD,
 NMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY,             
  NMRT.MERAKI_TRX_QTY 
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG WI
    ON (WI.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY) 
    WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_TRX_CG NCR 
    WHERE NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY)

SELECT 
  NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
  'REC' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  NMRT.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
  ELSE NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NMRT.GL_DT,
  NMRT.GL_POSTED_DT,
  NMRT.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE, 
  NMRT.PRODUCT_KEY,
  NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  ,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
  (NMRT.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT-NMRT.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  (NMRT.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT-NMRT.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
  /*EL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION_CNT,*/
  NMRT.CLAIM_END_DT ,  
  NMRT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   ,      
  NMRT.CLAIM_START_DT,  
  /*-7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,*/
  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
  NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, 
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
  ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
  /*NMRT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  NMRT.SS_CD,
  NMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  NMRT.MERAKI_TRX_QTY                   
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON NMRT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = (CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN
  NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ELSE NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
  WHERE NMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
  AND NMRT.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND NMRT.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV' 
  AND DRVDR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY>0
  )
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDB1.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY>0
  )
  /* AND  NOT EXISTS 
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
    WHERE  DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0 
    )  
 AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
    WHERE DRVDB1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDB1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0)*/
    UNION ALL
  SELECT
  EXNCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
  'REC' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  EXNCR.AR_TRX_KEY,
  EXNCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*BOTH TOP AND SUBSKU WILL HAVE VALID TRX LINE INFORMATION*/
  EXNCR.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
  ELSE NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  EXNCR.GL_DT,
  EXNCR.GL_POSTED_DT,
  EXNCR.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,  
  EXNCR.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
  EXNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
  (EXNCR.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT-EXNCR.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  (EXNCR.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT-EXNCR.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
  EXNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  EXNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  EXNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
  NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, 
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
  ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  EXNCR.SS_CD,
  EXNCR.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  EXNCR.MERAKI_TRX_QTY
  FROM
   $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
   $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG EXNCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT
  ON EXNCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON EXNCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
  ON EXNCR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = (CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN
  NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ELSE NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 
  WHERE EXNCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
  AND EXNCR.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND EXNCR.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = EXNCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY>0 
  )
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = EXNCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDB1.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY>0
  )                  
 /* AND  NOT EXISTS 
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
    WHERE  DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0 
    )  
 AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
    WHERE DRVDB1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND DRVDB1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0)*/

SELECT
    WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
    WNCUR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
    /*COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,*/
 SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
    /*COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,*/
 WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
    WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
    'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
    WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
    1 AS BATCH_ID,
    NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
    WNCUR.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
    NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
    NULL        AS COMMENTS,
    NULL     AS CONTEXT,
    current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
    1         as CREATED_BY,
    current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
     -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
     NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
     NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
     WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
    NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
    'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
    WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
    'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
    WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
    current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
    WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
    WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
    NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
    NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
    NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
    WNRTC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD                  AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
    NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
    NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
    current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
    1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
    'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
    NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
    SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
    NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       AS LINE_TYPE,
    NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
    CASE  WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
     ELSE NULL
    END  AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
    CASE WHEN  WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN 
       CASE WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
         ELSE NULL
       END
     ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID
   END  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
   WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER   as ORDER_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
    NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
    NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
    NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
    0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
    NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
    CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
     ELSE 999   
   END AS REQUEST_ID,
   /* COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS  RULE_START_DATE,*/
   WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS  RULE_START_DATE,
   SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  
   SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT AS SALESREP_ID ,
     NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
     NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
    NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE,
     SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
   0 AS TERRITORY_ID,
   CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
     END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
    'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
    WNRTC.MERAKI_TRX_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
    WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
    NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
   WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE, 
    NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
    NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
    'INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
    WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
    SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS  BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER    SALES_REP_NUMBER,  
    SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT   AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
     FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WNRTC.SS_CODE
	   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNCUR
  ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=WNCUR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_GET_LINES_CG WNGL 
   ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_ACCT_RULE_CG WNGAR  
     ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGAR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG WSCF
   ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WSCF.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
     ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME*/          
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
     ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON (WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY ) 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
    ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
    AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
    AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
     ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
     AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
     AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
    ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
     ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
 WHERE 
 WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT
    WNICE.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
    WNICE.GL_DT AS GL_DATE,
    NII.SALES_ACCOUNT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY   AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
    ON  NII.ITEM_KEY=WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY     
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1    
    WHERE 
    WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'

SELECT
  WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY ,
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
   ELSE 
       CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
          CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
       ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID  END
   END AS LINE_ID,
   CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
   ELSE
    CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
   END AS ORDER_NUMBER
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON  WNRTC.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
  ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
  AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
  ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT
    WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
    WNCUR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
/*    COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
    COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,*/
    SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
    WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
    WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
    'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
    NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
    WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
    1 AS BATCH_ID,
    NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
    WNCUR.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
    NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
    NULL        AS COMMENTS,
    NULL       AS CONTEXT,
    current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
    1         as CREATED_BY,
    current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
     -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
     NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
     NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
     WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
    NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
    'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
    WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
    'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
    WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
    current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
    WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
    WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
    NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
    NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
    NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
    WNRTC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD                  AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
    NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
    NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
    current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
    1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
    'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
    NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
    NULL AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
    NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE      AS LINE_TYPE,
    NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
    NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
    WNGL.LINE_ID AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
    WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER   as ORDER_NUMBER,
    WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
    NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
    NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
    NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
    0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
    NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
    CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
     ELSE 999   
   END AS REQUEST_ID,
    /*COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS  RULE_START_DATE,*/
    WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT AS  RULE_START_DATE,
    COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  
 /*CASE WHEN WSCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
    ELSE COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
  END AS SALESREP_ID ,*/
    COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0) AS SALESREP_ID, /*METRIX_FLAG ALWAYS HARDCODED TO 'N'*/
     NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
     NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
    NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE,
   100 AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
   0 AS TERRITORY_ID,
  CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
     END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
    'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
    WNRTC.MERAKI_TRX_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
    WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
    NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
   WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE, 
    NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
    NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
    'INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
    WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
/*    WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,*/
    'Direct Sales' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    NDEF.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,  
    COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY),
    -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  
     FROM 
  (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV WHERE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK' AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' AND  UPPER(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' ) DEF_RULE,
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_EXP_CG WNRTC 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WNRTC.SS_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_CUR_CG WNCUR
  ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=WNCUR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_GET_LINES_CG WNGL 
   ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGL.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
   /* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_MERK_ACCT_RULE_CG WNGAR  
     ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WNGAR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_MERK_CG WSCF
   ON WNRTC.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = WSCF.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO.SS_CODE   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
   ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
     ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  */        
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
     ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON (WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY ) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
   on ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
   AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
   ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice' 
   AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
   ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.' 
   AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
   ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.' 
   AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CSTMR_ACCT_LOCATR_ASGN_TV ASGN
   ON NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = ASGN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 
   AND ASGN.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR_TV LOC
   ON ASGN.LOCATOR_KEY = LOC.LOCATOR_KEY 
   AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV NDEF
   ON NDEF.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = LOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
   AND NDEF.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'
   AND UPPER(NDEF.BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
     ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
 WHERE 
 WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'
